zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Russell於1374年出生在英國武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆時，她的父親John Russell34歲，母親Agnes De La Planche32歲。她於1400年與Robert Wingfield在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年5月3日在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆享年35歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Russell于1374年出生在英国武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆时，她的父亲John Russell34岁，母亲Agnes De La Planche32岁。她于1400年与Robert Wingfield在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年5月3日在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆享年35岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Russell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: of Norman origin, from Old French and Anglo-Norman French r(o)ussel, a diminutive of Old French rous(e) ‘red, reddish’, used either as a nickname for someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion, or as a personal name. Compare Rouse . This Norman name has been established in Ireland since the 12th century. It has been reinforced in Britain and Ireland by Huguenot bearers of the name Roussel, of the same Old French origin.

English: habitational name from any of several places called Rushall (Norfolk, Staffordshire, Wiltshire) or possibly sometimes from Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent). Rushall in Staffordshire derives from Old English rysc ‘rush, rushes’ + halh ‘nook, corner of land’. Rushall in Norfolk derives from an uncertain first element + Old English halh. Rushall in Wiltshire derives from an Old English personal name Rust (genitive Rustes) + halh. Rusthall in Speldhurst (Kent) probably derives from Old English rust ‘rust, rust color’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’, but with a change in the final element due to influence from Middle English, Old English hall ‘hall, residence’, perhaps referring to a nearby building.
Americanized form of German Rüssel, from a pet form of any of various personal names formed with the element hrōd ‘fame, renown’.

variants.name: Russler
meanings: occupational name for a farmer, from an agent derivative of rüsseln ‘to shallow plow’.

variants.name: Rouse
meanings: English: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French rous(e) ‘red(-haired)’ (from Latin russ(e)us).
Walloon and northern French (Rousé): variant of Rosé (see Rose ).

variants.name: Russel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Russell  .
German: from a pet form of Russ, see Russ 2.
northwest German (Rüssel): probably a variant of Rossel .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Russell was born in 1374, in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, her father, John Russell, was 34 and her mother, Agnes De La Planche, was 32. She married Robert Wingfield in 1400, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 May 1409, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Russell est née en 1374, à Strensham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Russell, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes De La Planche, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Wingfield en 1400, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1409, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Russell 1374 in Strensham, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Russell 34 und ihre Mutter Agnes De La Planche 32. Sie hat 1400 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Wingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1409 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Letheringham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Russell è nata il nel 1374 nel Strensham, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, John Russell, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Agnes De La Planche, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Robert Wingfield nel 1400, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1409, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Russellが1374年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストレンシャムで生まれた時，父John Russellは34歳，母Agnes De La Plancheは32歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでRobert Wingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年5月3日にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで35歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Russell(이)가 1374년 영국 워스스터실르 스트렌샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Russell(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De La Planche(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Robert Wingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 5월 3일 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Russell nasceu em 1374, em Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Russell, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De La Planche, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Wingfield em 1400, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1409, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Russell родилась в 1374 г. в местности стреншам, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Russell было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes De La Planche, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Wingfield в 1400 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 мая 1409 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Russell nació en 1374, en Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Russell, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes De La Planche, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Robert Wingfield en 1400, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1409, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
